CustomField.description: Used only when Product_Scope_Type__c = Specific Products. Comma-separated list of Product2.ProductCode values. Matched case-insensitively (trimmed) by PromoCodeAllocationEngine against OrderItem.Product2.ProductCode. The promoSpecificProductPicker LWC is the staff-facing input; its persistence semantics must align with this contract — codes, not names. Apply-flow side: OrderItems whose Product2.ProductCode is in the CSV are eligible.
CustomField.label: Specific Products
